params.baseTokenId: The specific token ID to buy
params.price: Maximum price willing to pay per unit
Price per unit set by the node

params.newPrice: The new maximum price willing to pay

cancelNodeSellOrder(bytes32).notice: Node cancels their sell order, returning inventory

getBuyOrders(address,uint256,address,uin.notice: Get all open buy orders for a trading pair (sorted by price desc)

getOrderBook(address,uint256,address).notice: Get best bid and ask for a trading pair

getSellOrders(address,uint256,address,ui.notice: Get all open sell orders for a trading pair (sorted by price asc)

placeBuyOrder(address,uint256,address,ui.notice: Buyer places a limit buy order at their chosen price

placeNodeSellOrder(address,uint256,addre.notice: Node places a sell order for their inventory at chosen price

settleOrder(bytes32).notice: Settle order and release funds (called after delivery confirmed)

updateBuyOrderPrice(bytes32,uint256).notice: Buyer updates price on existing buy order

updateNodeSellOrderPrice(bytes32,uint256.notice: Node updates price on existing sell order
